specializations: Skin microbiome science and postbiotic actives
product_highlights: AnGelica™ — proprietary postbiotic-peptide complex clinically proven to improve skin barrier and reduce inflammation
Microbiome-validated biotech actives tested against skin microbiome diversity indices
Ectoine-based extremophile actives for barrier repair and anti-pollution protection
Fully transparent formulation approach with open-access clinical study data
notes: Codex Beauty Labs is a science-driven US-based company that bridges dermatology research and cosmetic biotechnology, specialising in postbiotic actives and skin microbiome-compatible formulation. Their proprietary AnGelica™ postbiotic-peptide complex is derived from biotech-optimised fermentation and has been clinically validated in a published peer-reviewed clinical trial demonstrating improvements in skin barrier function and inflammatory markers. Codex Beauty's commitment to open-access science and transparent ingredient disclosure makes them a distinctive voice in the biotech cosmetic actives space, with their postbiotic platform serving as a model for evidence-based microbiome-friendly formulation.
